page_content:
EDSP664 Issues and Models:Secondary/Middle Special Education (3 Credits)

Issues, legislation, and service models in secondary/middle special education. Emphasis on career and vocational education, self- determination, and transition.

Jointly offered with: EDSP466.

Restriction: Permission of EDUC-Counseling, Higher Education and Special Education department.

Credit Only Granted for. EDSP466 or EDSP664.
